Item 1. Business Item 1A. Risk Factors Item 7. MD&A Item 8. Financial Statements Intel Corporation

ITEM 1. Business

Intel designs and manufactures advanced integrated digital technology platforms.

We sell platform products to OEMs, ODMs, and other manufacturers.

See Item 1 above for segment discussion only in narrative cross-references elsewhere.

ITEM 1A.

Supply chain constraints and manufacturing delays may adversely affect results.

Competition in data center, client, and foundry markets remains intense.

Item 1B. Unresolved Staff Comments

Not applicable.

Item 1C. Cybersecurity

Intel maintains enterprise security controls and incident response procedures.

Item 7. Management's Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition

Net revenue decreased due to lower client and data center volumes.

Gross margin was impacted by factory start-up costs and inventory charges.

Revenue54,228
Operating income1,234

Item 8. Financial Statements and Supplementary Data

Index to consolidated financial statements begins on page F-1.

Notes to consolidated financial statements include fair value and debt disclosures.
